HomePage.title: Welcome to our Website!
HomePage.description: This is an example of a multi-language application using next-intl.

Reciters.title: Featured Reciters
Reciters.description: Listen to beautiful Quran recitations from renowned reciters around the world. Each voice carries the divine message with unique beauty and spiritual depth.
Reciters.input: Search reciters by name or style
Reciters.no-reciters-description: We couldn't find any reciters matching your search.Try adjusting your search terms or browse all available reciters.
Reciters.error-loading-title: An error occurred while loading data.

ReciterPage.no-surahs-description: We couldn't find any surahs matching your search.Try adjusting your search terms or browse all available surahs.

Surahs.description: Browse all 114 Surahs of the Holy Quran

VerseAction.no-play: This verse has no audio. Use the play button at the top.
VerseAction.copy-message: Verse has been copied to clipboard

RadiosPage.no-stations-description: We couldn't find any stations matching your search.Try adjusting your search terms or browse all available stations.

QuickAccessNavigation.dialogDescription: Quickly navigate to a specific Surah and Ayah.

SignIn.title: Welcome Back
SignIn.subtitle: Sign in to sync your favorites, settings and continue your Quran journey
SignIn.terms: By signing in, you agree to our terms of service

AuthError.title: Access Denied
AuthError.access-denied-description: We're sorry, but registration is currently closed. The maximum number of users has been reached.
AuthError.default-description: An error occurred during authentication. Please try again later.

Khatma.title: Khatma Planner
Khatma.description: Plan and track your Quran completion journey. Set daily reading goals and stay motivated.
Khatma.createPlanDescription: Start your journey to complete the Holy Quran. Set your daily goal and we'll calculate the rest.
Khatma.pagesPerDayHelp: Based on this number, we'll calculate your expected Khatma completion date.
Khatma.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes or reminders for this plan...
Khatma.createError: Failed to create plan. Please try again.
Khatma.existingPlanError: You already have an active Khatma plan. Please complete or delete it before creating a new one.
Khatma.updateError: Failed to update. Please try again.
Khatma.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this plan? This action cannot be undone.
Khatma.deleteError: Failed to delete plan. Please try again.
Khatma.noPlansDescription: Start your journey to complete the Holy Quran by creating your first plan.

KhatmaValidation.invalidChars: HTML tags or special characters are not allowed
KhatmaValidation.minPages: Must read at least 1 page daily
KhatmaValidation.notesLong: Notes must be less than 200 characters
KhatmaValidation.pagesPerDayInvalid: Invalid pages per day. Must be between 1 and 604.

KhatmaReader.title: Khatma Reading
KhatmaReader.noActiveKhatma: No active Khatma plan. Please create a plan to start reading.
KhatmaReader.pageLoadError: Failed to load page data. Please try again.
KhatmaReader.tryRefreshing: Try refreshing the page or check your internet connection.
